results.resolved_title: Two type III secretion system effectors from Ralstonia solanacearum GMI1000 determine host-range specificity on tobacco.
results.quote: two type III secretion system effector genes, avrA and popP1, are limiting the host range of strain GMI1000
results.note: Abstract only (no PMC). PopP1 named as a GMI1000 T3SS effector.

results.resolved_title: Two type III secretion system effectors from Ralstonia solanacearum GMI1000 determine host-range specificity on tobacco.
results.note: Abstract-only retrieval; abstract covers only avrA and popP1, not popP2/RSc0826. Absence from non-retrieved full text = INACCESSIBLE.

results.resolved_title: Two type III secretion system effectors from Ralstonia solanacearum GMI1000 determine host-range specificity on tobacco.
results.quote: two type III secretion system effector genes, avrA and popP1, are limiting the host range of strain GMI1000
results.note: Abstract only. AvrA (RipAA) named as a GMI1000 T3SS effector; abstract details its T3SS injection signal.

results.resolved_title: Two type III secretion system effectors from Ralstonia solanacearum GMI1000 determine host-range specificity on tobacco.
results.note: Abstract-only; PopA/RSc1080 not in abstract (focuses on avrA, popP1). Cannot judge from non-retrieved full text.

results.resolved_title: Two type III secretion system effectors from Ralstonia solanacearum GMI1000 determine host-range specificity on tobacco.
results.note: Abstract-only; PopB/RSc1085 not in abstract. Cannot judge from non-retrieved full text.

results.resolved_title: Two type III secretion system effectors from Ralstonia solanacearum GMI1000 determine host-range specificity on tobacco.
results.note: Abstract-only; PopC/RSc1086 not in abstract. Cannot judge from non-retrieved full text.

results.resolved_title: OspF and OspC1 Are Shigella flexneri Type III Secretion System Effectors That Are Required for Postinvasion Aspects of Virulence
results.note: Only abstract retrieved (full_text empty). Abstract covers OspF and OspC1 only; OspB/CP0009 not present. Absence from non-retrieved full text = INACCESSIBLE.

results.resolved_title: OspF and OspC1 Are Shigella flexneri Type III Secretion System Effectors That Are Required for Postinvasion Aspects of Virulence
results.quote: OspF and OspC1 are known to be secreted by [Shigella], but their functions are unknown. We ... verified that these proteins are secreted in a T3SS-dependent manner.
results.note: From abstract. Shigella flexneri T3SS effector confirmed.

results.resolved_title: OspF and OspC1 Are Shigella flexneri Type III Secretion System Effectors That Are Required for Postinvasion Aspects of Virulence
results.note: Only abstract retrieved; abstract covers OspF and OspC1 only, not OspC2/CP0095. Absence from non-retrieved full text = INACCESSIBLE.

results.resolved_title: OspF and OspC1 Are Shigella flexneri Type III Secretion System Effectors That Are Required for Postinvasion Aspects of Virulence
results.quote: OspF and OspC1 are known to be secreted by [Shigella], but their functions are unknown. We ... verified that these proteins are secreted in a T3SS-dependent manner.
results.note: From abstract. Shigella flexneri T3SS effector confirmed.

results.resolved_title: Transcriptional regulation of the Yts1 type II secretion system of Yersinia enterocolitica and identification of secretion substrates.
results.quote: We identified three proteins, ChiY, EngY (YE2830) and YE3650, that are secreted depending on a functional Yts1 T2SS in response to MgCl(2) at low temperature.
results.note: EngY (YE2830) named as Yts1 T2SS substrate in Y. enterocolitica.

results.resolved_title: Transcriptional regulation of the Yts1 type II secretion system of Yersinia enterocolitica and identification of secretion substrates.
results.quote: We identified three proteins, ChiY, EngY (YE2830) and YE3650, that are secreted depending on a functional Yts1 T2SS in response to MgCl(2) at low temperature.
results.note: YE3650 named as Yts1 T2SS substrate in Y. enterocolitica.

results.resolved_title: Transcriptional regulation of the Yts1 type II secretion system of Yersinia enterocolitica and identification of secretion substrates.
results.quote: We identified three proteins, ChiY, EngY (YE2830) and YE3650, that are secreted depending on a functional Yts1 T2SS in response to MgCl(2) at low temperature.
results.note: ChiY named as Yts1 T2SS substrate in Y. enterocolitica. (Batch maps chiY to YE3650; both are abstract-confirmed Yts1 substrates.)

results.resolved_title: Proteomic Identification of Novel Secreted Antibacterial Toxins of the Serratia marcescens Type VI Secretion System
results.quote: These proteins seemed strong candidates for T6SS substrates ... SMA1112, SMA3980, SMA4628 and SMA4673 were named according to the [Serratia]-specific small secreted protein (Ssp) nomenclature as Ssp3, Ssp4, Ssp5, and Ssp6
results.note: Full text. Ssp3 = T6SS-secreted protein of S. marcescens Db10.

results.resolved_title: Proteomic Identification of Novel Secreted Antibacterial Toxins of the Serratia marcescens Type VI Secretion System
results.quote: These proteins seemed strong candidates for T6SS substrates ... SMA1112, SMA3980, SMA4628 and SMA4673 were named according to the [Serratia]-specific small secreted protein (Ssp) nomenclature as Ssp3, Ssp4, Ssp5, and Ssp6
results.note: Full text. Ssp4 = T6SS-secreted protein of S. marcescens Db10.

results.resolved_title: Proteomic Identification of Novel Secreted Antibacterial Toxins of the Serratia marcescens Type VI Secretion System
results.quote: These proteins seemed strong candidates for T6SS substrates ... SMA1112, SMA3980, SMA4628 and SMA4673 were named according to the [Serratia]-specific small secreted protein (Ssp) nomenclature as Ssp3, Ssp4, Ssp5, and Ssp6
results.note: Full text. Ssp5 = T6SS-secreted protein of S. marcescens Db10.

results.resolved_title: Invasion of Cryptococcus neoformans into human brain microvascular endothelial cells requires protein kinase C-alpha activation.
results.quote: Invasion of Cryptococcus neoformans into human brain microvascular endothelial cells requires protein kinase C-alpha activation.
results.note: DOI registers (PubMed/PMC, PMID 18489726) to a Cryptococcus neoformans/PKC-alpha host-cell paper. No Brucella, no VirB/T4SS, no VceA. Provenance defect.

results.resolved_title: Invasion of Cryptococcus neoformans into human brain microvascular endothelial cells requires protein kinase C-alpha activation.
results.quote: Invasion of Cryptococcus neoformans into human brain microvascular endothelial cells requires protein kinase C-alpha activation.
results.note: Same DOI as VceA: resolves to a Cryptococcus/PKC fungal paper, not Brucella abortus VirB T4SS. No VceC. Provenance defect.

results.resolved_title: A bipartite signal mediates the transfer of type IV secretion substrates of Bartonella into human cells
results.quote: These translocated effector proteins (Beps) A-G are encoded together with the VirB system and the T4S coupling protein VirD4 on a [Bartonella]-specific pathogenicity island.
results.note: Abstract. Bartonella VirB (T4SS) translocated effectors Bep A-G include BepA.

results.resolved_title: A bipartite signal mediates the transfer of type IV secretion substrates of Bartonella into human cells
results.quote: These translocated effector proteins (Beps) A-G are encoded together with the VirB system and the T4S coupling protein VirD4 on a [Bartonella]-specific pathogenicity island.
results.note: Abstract. Bartonella VirB (T4SS) translocated effectors Bep A-G include BepB.

results.resolved_title: Manipulation of intestinal epithelial cell function by the cell contact-dependent type III secretion systems of Vibrio parahaemolyticus
results.note: Full text retrieved (review of V. parahaemolyticus T3SS1/T3SS2 effectors). VopR/VP1683 is never mentioned; the review's effector set (VopA/C/F/L/Q/S/T/V/Z etc.) excludes it. VopR is a real Vp T3SS1 effector per external lit (FASEB 2025, fcimb 2020) but this cited review provides no evidence for it.

results.resolved_title: Manipulation of intestinal epithelial cell function by the cell contact-dependent type III secretion systems of Vibrio parahaemolyticus
results.note: Full text retrieved. VopX/VPA1374 is never mentioned in this review. Right organism and system but no evidence for this specific protein.

results.resolved_title: Essential role of TRPC channels in the guidance of nerve growth cones by brain-derived neurotrophic factor.
results.quote: Essential role of TRPC channels in the guidance of nerve growth cones by brain-derived neurotrophic factor.
results.note: DOI registers (PMID 15758952) to a neuroscience paper on TRPC channels/BDNF in rat/Xenopus neurons. No E. coli, no T3SS, no TccP/EspFu. Provenance defect.

results.resolved_title: Type III Effector RipJ Triggers Bacterial Wilt Resistance in [tomato].
results.quote: we show that [Ralstonia solanacearum] effector RipJ functions as an avirulence determinant ... RipJ belongs to the YopJ family of acetyltransferases.
results.note: Abstract. RipJ named as a R. solanacearum type III-secreted (avirulence) effector.

results.resolved_title: A widely-occurring family of pore-forming effectors broadens the impact of the Serratia marcescens Type VI secretion system
results.quote: This T6SS also delivers the ion-selective pore-forming effector Ssp6, which forms cation-selective pores in vitro and ... disrupts the inner membrane potential in vivo
results.note: Full text. Ssp6 = T6SS-delivered effector of S. marcescens Db10.

results.resolved_title: Pectate lyase PelI of Erwinia chrysanthemi 3937 belongs to a new family.
results.quote: PelI is an extracellular protein secreted by the Out secretory pathway of E. chrysanthemi.
results.note: Abstract. Out = T2SS. Erwinia chrysanthemi 3937 is the synonym/same strain as Dickeya dadantii 3937. PelI = T2SS substrate.

results.resolved_title: HIF-1alpha is involved in mediating apoptosis resistance to Chlamydia trachomatis-infected cells.
results.quote: HIF-1alpha is involved in mediating apoptosis resistance to Chlamydia trachomatis-infected cells.
results.note: DOI registers (PMID 21824245) to a Chlamydia trachomatis host-apoptosis/HIF-1alpha paper. No Anaplasma phagocytophilum, no VirB/T4SS, no AptA. Provenance defect.

results.resolved_title: Specific recognition of linear polyubiquitin by A20 zinc finger 7 is involved in NF-kB regulation.
results.quote: Specific recognition of linear polyubiquitin by A20 zinc finger 7 is involved in NF-kB regulation.
results.note: DOI registers (PMID 23032187, PMC3463848) to a human structural-biology paper on A20/linear ubiquitin/NF-kB. No Legionella, no Dot/Icm T4SS, no LegG1/PieG. Provenance defect.

results.resolved_title: A protein-protein interaction map reveals that the Coxiella burnetii effector CirB inhibits host proteasome activity
results.quote: The effector proteins (CBU0021, CBU0937, CBU1823, CBU1825 and CBU2013) were mainly associated with autophagy.
results.note: Full text. CBU0937 (=CirD) is among the 53 Coxiella burnetii Dot/Icm T4SS effectors mapped (>150 effectors transferred by Dot/Icm per abstract). Paper's lead effector is CirB; CBU0937 treated as a translocated effector.

results.resolved_title: Diverse type VI secretion phospholipases are functionally plastic antibacterial effectors
results.quote: These data show that Tle1 is an antibacterial effector delivered between cells by T6S, and that I2699, henceforth referred to as Tli1 ... protects against Tle1.
results.note: Full text. Tle1 = BTH_I2698 (Burkholderia thailandensis E264), T6SS antibacterial effector. Batch organism field blank but locus tag matches paper.

results.resolved_title: EspP, a novel extracellular serine protease of enterohaemorrhagic Escherichia coli O157:H7 cleaves human coagulation factor V.
results.quote: the extracellular serine protease EspP, which is encoded by the large plasmid of enterohaemorrhagic Escherichia coli (EHEC) O157:H7 ... It can be grouped into the autotransporter protein family.
results.note: Abstract. EspP autotransporter = T5SS (T5aSS) of E. coli O157:H7. Matches organism.
